question: Tell me about yourself
transcript: Hello, my name is Sigina, I am a junior majoring in computer science currently. I work at the ISC Research Park on large language models building new technologies that helped bridge the gap between softwares and zirmin dirigings and the world requirements.
feedback:
SCORE: 7/10

TOP 3 THINGS TO FIX:
1. Reference specific projects: Mention your work on the "SignalVerse" project to demonstrate your practical experience with AI.
2. Expand your narrative: Start with your journey into computer science and how your academic achievements fueled your passion for AI.
3. Connect your passion to the role: Clearly articulate why you are drawn to AI and how your skills align with the role at Anthropic.

WHAT YOU DID WELL:
You have a strong academic background and a solid foundation in AI/ML technologies. Your ability to avoid filler words indicates confidence, and your technical skills are impressive.

SUGGESTED REWRITE (using ONLY your real experience):
My journey into computer science began with a fascination for problem-solving, which was further fueled by my consistent academic excellence, including making the Dean’s List multiple times. This passion led me to work as an Undergrad Research Assistant, where I collaborated with domain experts on hybrid AI frameworks. A standout project was "SignalVerse," where I deployed an LLM-powered RAG platform for semantic querying of traffic signal manuals. This experience honed my skills in applying AI to real-world challenges. I am particularly drawn to the role at Anthropic because of my interest in using AI to solve complex problems, as demonstrated by my project "Sim2Video," which converts natural language descriptions into structured scenarios for synthetic data generation. I am excited about the opportunity to contribute to Anthropic's mission of building safe and beneficial AI systems, where I can further develop my skills and make a meaningful impact.
